sources.title: Los Liantes, The Liars 1981
sources.description: A tale of two con men running around a resort by the sea. No English sound track or subs so I can't tell for sure where the film is located but it is heavily populated with attractive women in bikinis.

metadata.Plot: Spain, in the early eighties. Fidel, Amador and Eduardo form a group of scammers. One day they know a very superstitious man who believes that there is "the elephant man", a man of good luck, and they plan the scam of their lives.
metadata.Actors: Fernando Esteso, Andrés Pajares, Antonio Ozores
